title: India’s AI Governance Wager at the 2026 AI Impact Summit
description: India hosted the fourth global AI summit in New Delhi from 16th to 21st February 2026, following Bletchley Park (2023), Seoul (2024), and Paris (2025) — the first in this series to be hosted by a developing nation. India’s framing […] The post India’s AI Governance Wager at the 2026 AI Impact Summit appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
